caption: A man wearing a dark blazer over a white t-shirt stands on a stage in front of a large digital screen. The screen displays the heading "CRYPTO-ML LTD." and bullet points that read, "Let's jump the hype-train!", "A large scale crypto-analysis platform", "Heavy compute data analysis, Transform, Fetch...", and "Going deep running predictions on LSTMs". At the bottom of the screen, it asks, "CAN WE SURVIVE THE 2017 CRYPTO-CRAZE?". Below the main projection area, a white banner features the "europython" logo next to a green snake and the text "Edinburgh 23 29 July 2018". Across the sequence, the man gestures with his hands while speaking, moving from a neutral standing position to raising his left arm and pointing as he presents. The content on the screen remains static throughout the duration of the clip.
